entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The primary cereal crop studied for its response to nitrogen applications in semi-arid environments.

entities.name: APSIM
entities.description: The Agricultural Production Systems simulator model used to calibrate and evaluate crop growth and yield.

entities.name: RANDOMIZED COMPLETE BLOCK
entities.description: The experimental design used to conduct the field trials from 2014 to 2016.

entities.name: NIGERIA
entities.description: The country where the research stations and agroecological zones are located.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output, including biomass and grain.

entities.name: PHENOLOGICAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The timing and sequence of growth stages in the sorghum cultivars.

entities.name: ICSV-400
entities.description: An early-maturing sorghum cultivar used for model calibration and evaluation.

entities.name: IMPROVED-DEKO
entities.description: A medium-maturing sorghum cultivar used for model calibration and evaluation.

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: The total organic matter produced by the sorghum plants, used as a performance metric.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The weight of the harvested grain, used to determine the optimal nitrogen rate.

entities.name: NITROGEN FERTILIZER
entities.description: The nutrient input applied at varying rates to evaluate its effect on sorghum productivity.

entities.name: SUDANO-SAHELIAN ZONE
entities.description: An agroecological zone in Nigeria where nitrogen application rates were simulated.

entities.name: SUDAN SAVANNA ZONE
entities.description: An agroecological zone in Nigeria where nitrogen application rates were simulated.

entities.name: NORTHERN GUINEA SAVANNA
entities.description: An agroecological zone in Nigeria where nitrogen application rates were simulated.

entities.name: CLIMATE VARIABILITY
entities.description: Environmental changes that necessitate the use of adaptation strategies to maintain productivity.

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The overall efficiency and output of the sorghum crop in semi-arid environments.
